name: history_lecturer_academic_relocation_funding

communication_style.description: Very articulate and thoughtful. Writes long, grammatically correct sentences with nuanced explanations. Often adds historical or contextual remarks even when unnecessary. Communication can become overly detailed and academic. Uses careful wording and avoids overly casual tone.

first_prompt: I'm a history lecturer with teaching and publication experience, and I'm exploring relocation to universities in Canada where research support is taken seriously. My priorities are research opportunities, academic reputation, international collaboration, and a teaching workload that still leaves room for meaningful scholarship.
